name: UnitedHealth Group Incorporated
description: UnitedHealth Group is a diversified health care company dedicated to helping people live healthier lives and making the health system work better for everyone. The organization operates through two distinct and complementary businesses: UnitedHealthcare, which provides health care coverage and benefits services, and Optum, which delivers information and technology-enabled health services. Headquartered in the United States, the company serves millions of individuals globally, focusing on improving health outcomes, enhancing the quality of care, and reducing costs through innovation, data-driven insights, and a commitment to building a more modern, high-performing health care system.
